signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Players with this ability have a chance to replenish their stamina, once per play, when it is half depleted
Ballcarriers with this ability retain more of their forward momentum during tackles while travelling at high speeds.
Players with this ability avoid any ratings penalties associated with playing outside of their primary position
Ballcarriers with this ability can quickly shift momentum, change direction, and turn the corner without sacrificing speed.
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable juke animations.

signatureAbility.signatureActivationDescription: Make consecutive passes for 5+ yards in air
signatureAbility.signatureDescription: While in the pocket, passers with this ability are almost guaranteed to break the first sack attempt by any blitzing defender
Passers with this ability have increased throw power on bullet precision passes (except on high/low throws).
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all throws inside the numbers (except on high/low throws).
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while pass blocking.
Blockers with this ability start every new blocking encounter with built-in resistance
Players with this ability can detect user-controlled defenders before the snap; as well as 3rd and 4th down blitzers. Can be bluffed.
Defenders with this ability are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves (and cannot be faked out when user-controlled).
Defenders with this ability have a larger timing window for landing Perfect Hit Sticks
